name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival AA
When talking about the 24 Fall/Winter runway, the mirror-like pieces are sure to catch the eye 👁️ Clean, elegant lines, minimalist design and silhouette interplay. If you can only choose one piece, you must choose this TERENCE. The iconic TRIOMPHE logo element, gentle and elegant, patent calfskin, unique luster and recognizability - A petite and fun shape, perfect for hand or shoulder carry ❇️
TRIOMPHE snap closure, 1 main compartment
1 interior flat pocket
1 adjustable leather handle
Style No.: 118313
Color: Black
Size: 21x5.5x11cm
